metadata.title: Client Portal | OPS

home.noProjects: No projects yet. Your service provider will share project details with you here.

estimate.approved: Estimate approved! Thank you for your confirmation.
estimate.changesSent: Change request sent! Your provider will prepare an updated estimate.
estimate.declined: Estimate declined. We've notified your provider.
estimate.approveConfirmDesc: By approving this estimate, you are confirming acceptance of the scope and pricing detailed above.
estimate.changesDialogDesc: Describe the changes you'd like and we'll prepare an updated estimate for you.
estimate.declineDialogDesc: Let your provider know why this estimate doesn't work for you. This is optional but helps them prepare a better quote.
estimate.actionError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
